message:
feat(fcp-core): complete Core Types with from_static API and comprehensive tests

- Add from_static() methods to CapabilityId, ConnectorId, OperationId
  for compile-time known identifiers with panic-on-invalid semantics
- Fix golden vector tests for ObjectId and ZoneId BLAKE3 hashes
- Add 30 comprehensive tests covering identifier validation, zones,
  provenance, trust levels, and zone operations
- Update all connectors (discord, telegram, openai, anthropic) to use
  from_static() for static identifier construction

Closes: flywheel_connectors-1n78.4

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
